name: 07 — Weekly Readiness Summary (Scheduled)
_comment: ARCHITECTURE NOTE: n8n orchestrates only. All scoring, readiness classification, and digest generation happens server-side in Netlify Functions. This workflow calls /digest?type=weekly to get the pre-computed weekly summary including readiness distribution. Set SITE_URL env var.

_setup.notes: Connect 'Format Weekly Summary' to a Slack, email, or webhook node to deliver the weekly readiness summary. No DISCOVERY_SECRET required — this reads the weekly digest endpoint only.
